notes:
v0.2.0 — Local Whisper Mode. The big one.

Voquence can now transcribe your voice entirely on your Mac. No OpenAI Whisper API. No internet. No per-minute cost. Audio never leaves your device.

• New: Local Whisper transcription via whisper.cpp on Apple Silicon. ~141 MB model downloads once from inside Settings, then runs in roughly real-time on your CPU.
• Settings → Local Whisper: one-click model download with progress bar, on/off toggle, delete button. Toggle is greyed out until the model is installed.
• When toggled on, dictation skips OpenAI Whisper entirely. You still need your Anthropic key for the AI content modes. Raw Transcript mode now runs fully offline with zero API keys.
• Fully usable on a plane, on hotspot, or anywhere your Mac has power and a mic.

Smaller fixes: dictation hint at the bottom of the main window now reflects YOUR actual hotkey, and the Welcome screen no longer references the old Cmd+Opt+V default.

Privacy story is now bulletproof.
